title: Sync pie charts on slice filter
description: When a user clicks a pie slice, the table filters correctly but the other two pie charts are not updated. All three pie charts should stay in sync with the data currently displayed in the table. Clicking a slice in any chart should rebuild the other two charts using only the filtered rows.
success_criteria: charts.js stores the current dataset in _currentData when buildCharts is called
syncNonActiveCharts rebuilds non-active charts using DataTable filtered rows
charts.js exposes Charts.applyFilter(colHeader, rawValues, category, chartId) for testing
After clicking a priority slice: action and author charts total equals filtered row count
After clicking an action slice: priority and author charts total equals filtered row count
After clicking an author slice: priority and action charts total equals filtered row count
No console errors during filter and sync operations
notes: syncNonActiveCharts gets filtered rows from DataTable.rows({filter:'applied'}).data() after refreshDt(). DataTable stores display values, so row[colIdx] returns values that buildPriorityChart etc. can process correctly. The clicked chart is NOT rebuilt — it keeps its active slice highlighted. Only the other two rebuild.
